findings: Agent omitted GRANT EXECUTE on new RPC function
No convention-check step to verify grants match function count
13/13 prior migrations had explicit grants but pattern was not enforced
proposed_changes: Add mandatory post-migration GRANT verification grep
Add convention callout in agent prompt

replay_plan.failed_slice: Create a new RPC function migration — verify the agent includes GRANT EXECUTE without prompting
replay_plan.near_neighbor: Create a migration with multiple functions — verify each gets its own GRANT
replay_plan.canary: Apply a simple ALTER TABLE migration with no functions — should not trigger GRANT checks

summary: db-architect needs explicit GRANT checklist for RPC migrations
